summary: Performance Metrics System testing completed successfully. All 22 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The new performance metrics system with Paper vs Live trading separation, equity curves, Sharpe ratio with BTC benchmark, and compliance badges is fully functional.

issues: Minor Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions during tab transitions - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/metrics/combined - Combined paper and live metrics (200)
Frontend: PerformanceMetrics component loads in Dashboard
Frontend: Paper Trading compliance badge visible
Frontend: Live Trading compliance badge visible
Frontend: Paper Trading summary card visible
Frontend: Live Trading summary card visible
Frontend: 4 tabs visible (Overview, Equity Curves, Risk Metrics, Daily P&L)
Frontend: Overview tab shows side-by-side cards
Frontend: Equity Curves tab shows daily charts
Frontend: Risk Metrics tab shows Sharpe cards with BTC benchmark
Frontend: Daily P&L tab renders (shows 'No data available' for empty data)
critical_code_review_comments: Performance metrics API is well-structured with proper separation of paper vs live trading
Sharpe ratio calculation includes proper annualization and BTC benchmark comparison
Compliance labels and disclaimers are comprehensive with appropriate risk warnings
Frontend PerformanceMetrics component properly uses data-testid attributes for testing
All API endpoints properly validate mode parameter and return 400 for invalid values
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_metrics_api.py - Created comprehensive metrics API tests (22 tests)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use demo wallet which returns empty metrics (expected behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance metrics system fully functional. All 9 API endpoints working correctly. Frontend PerformanceMetrics component integrated in Dashboard at line 1332. Demo mode shows empty metrics (0% return, 0 trades) which is expected. To see actual metrics data, trades need to be executed first via the trading API.

features_verified.compliance_paper_api: ✅ GET /api/metrics/compliance/paper - Returns paper trading labels and disclaimers
features_verified.compliance_live_api: ✅ GET /api/metrics/compliance/live - Returns live trading labels and risk warnings
features_verified.summary_api: ✅ GET /api/metrics/summary - Returns performance summary with Sharpe, win rate, drawdown
features_verified.sharpe_api: ✅ GET /api/metrics/sharpe - Returns Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar ratios with BTC benchmark
features_verified.frontend_tabbed_navigation: ✅ 4 tabs working (Overview, Equity Curves, Risk Metrics, Daily P&L)
